notes: Balloonist LLC registered at 103 Foulk Road, Suite 202, Wilmington, DE 19803 via Corporation Service Company. Both addresses have been used for at least three other data center projects later revealed to be Meta, including Degas LLC in Beaver Dam, WI. Described as 'one of the five major tech firms' and 'American-based company.'
DataBank's LGA3 facility in Orangeburg is 'nearly fully leased with industry-leading customers including CoreWeave.' CoreWeave is confirmed as a major tenant.

Cumulus / Talen Energy sold the adjacent Cumulus data center campus to AWS for $650M. The Hollenback Township parcels abut land owned by Cumulus Real Estate Holdings LLC (Talen subsidiary), expanding the AWS data center campus adjacent to the Susquehanna nuclear power plant.
Microsoft identified itself as the company behind the plan in January 2026. Franklin Lowell LLC was applying on behalf of Microsoft for the 235-acre data center campus at 4687 Alden Nash Avenue SE.

Imperial Valley Computer Manufacturing LLC developing 330MW data center with Google referenced as anchor tenant in developer emails and internal memos. DCD headline: '330MW Google-linked data center proposed in Southern California.' Developer has not officially confirmed but Google has been identified in multiple sources.
